summary: Email blast announcing the launch of Cavallo Purple Trek hoof boots in sizes 0-6, with free gift and free shipping in the USA and Canada.
Recap of Cavallo attending the first Canadian Equine Hoof Care Conference in Regina to celebrate barefoot trimmers and the booted hoof care movement.
Comprehensive laminitis guide explaining what happens to hooves during laminitis and how to manage care, healing, and recovery with Cavallo boots.
Part 1 of the Cavallo laminitis series, focused on understanding laminitis and answering the most common questions about booting to heal it.
Part 2 of the Cavallo laminitis series, covering immediate relief and managing laminitis with Cavallo hoof boots, pads, and ice therapy.
Part 3 of the Cavallo laminitis series, sharing hope and recovery stories plus videos on diet, herd connection, and hoof care after laminitis.
Mother's Day promotion offering a free set of three Cavallo books on hoof care, nutrition, and horse care, normally $54.85 USD.
Cavallo Gel Pads, sold in pairs: a thermoplastic elastomer therapeutic hoof boot insole for shock absorption and rehab of laminitis, navicular, and thin soles.
Cavallo Simple Ride Mask with Ears, a transparent UV-protective fly mask that attaches to the bridle with velcro to shield horses from insects and debris.
Cavallo Pastern Wraps, sold in pairs: neoprene wraps that protect pasterns and heel bulbs from rubbing and improve fit under all Cavallo hoof boots (sizes 0-6).
Cavallo Hoof Boot Stud Application Tool, a reusable drill attachment for installing Cavallo winter ice studs into hoof boots.
Empty Cavallo blog index landing page with no content body.
